nasb.text: They were both righteous in the sight of God, walking blamelessly in all the commandments and requirements of the Lord.

esv.text: And they were both righteous before God, walking blamelessly in all the commandments and statutes of the Lord.

cnv.text: 他們在　神面前都是義人，遵行主的一切誡命規條，無可指摘，

ccb.text: 夫妻二人遵行主的一切诫命和条例，无可指责，在上帝眼中是义人。

csbs.text: 他们两个人在神面前都是义人，遵行主的一切诫命和公义规定，无可指责。
